title: Tammy and the Millionaire
director: Leslie Goodwins, Sidney Miller, Ezra Stone
writer: Cid Ricketts Sumner, George Tibbles, Robert V. Barron
actors: Debbie Watson, Frank McGrath, Denver Pyle
plot: Tammy, a spunky young woman, has a series of adventures, including becoming a secretary, losing her house, regaining her house, and falling in love.
